---
title: "‘Temper.’ By Charlotte M. Yonge"
---

## ‘Temper.’ By Charlotte M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1900
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 10.37 (Jan. 1900) 26-33

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
